## Epic

Page Design Issues (Dummy Data Only)

## Description

- Implement search bar component visible in header on desktop, in overlay on mobile
- Use a mock search index to return results for pages, actions, and records
- Provide result groups (Pages, Actions, Records) with keyboard navigation
- Design spec (must use; measurable):
  - Tokens per Issue 3
  - Input height 44px; clear icon; debounce 250–400ms
  - Result rows min-height 44px; active row visually distinct and announced
  - Empty state with guidance copy

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Search opens, filters, and navigates via keyboard
- [ ] Grouped results from mock index
- [ ] Empty and error states implemented
- [ ] PR includes screenshots and short demo GIF

`frontend`, `search`, `ux`, `priority-medium`
